Subject: Notice of RTO West Documents Posted for Jan. 25 Mtg
Message:
Hello, Everyone - 
 
We have posted drafts of:
 
- the Revised RTO West Bylaws,
- an outline of Proposed ADR Provisions from the tariff proposed for inclusion in the Bylaws, and
- a Revised Draft of the RTO West Pricing Proposal
 
at www.rtowest.org/Stage2RRG_Upcoming.htm <http://www.rtowest.org/Stage2RRG_Upcoming.htm> .
 
These documents will be presented at the upcoming Stakeholder Clarification meeting this Friday, January 25, 2002, at the Kingstad Conference Center beginning at 8:30 a.m. PST.
